steps.title: Apply the inequalities with y = 67
steps.content:
The point $(x, 67)$ has $y = 67$. The first inequality $y \gt 15$ is satisfied since $67 \gt 15$. Correct

For the second inequality $5x + y \lt 23$, substitute $y = 67$:
$$5x + 67 \lt 23$$
$$5x \lt -44$$
$$x \lt -8.8$$

steps.title: Determine which choice satisfies the constraint x < -8.8
steps.content:
Testing each choice:
  • $-10$: $-10 \lt -8.8$ Correct
  • $-6$: $-6 \lt -8.8$ Incorrect
  • $6$: $6 \lt -8.8$ Incorrect
  • $10$: $10 \lt -8.8$ Incorrect
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
